note: AUD5 fix for finding F-16 (docs/flowmap/audit/04-findings.md). SCOPE: suite wiring — the tests already passed under their documented runners; they simply ran nowhere.

intent.problem: AUD3 T9: diff.test.mjs, diff-views.test.mjs and diff-roundtrip.test.mjs existed but were wired into neither spec:test:all nor CI — they ran never. Two of them import app TS (src/io/mermaid.ts) and CANNOT run under plain node --test; their headers document run-bundled-test.mjs as the runner.
intent.approach: diff.test.mjs joins the node --test list; diff-views + diff-roundtrip run via run-bundled-test.mjs appended to spec:test:all (CI inherits via F-06). A gate-parity test asserts all three stay wired (red pre-fix).
intent.rationale: wire-not-delete: all three pass under their documented runners, and diff-roundtrip is the canary proving fromMermaid feeds diffModels with zero false positives — exactly the review surface's trust chain.
